whatWeDo.title: What Ontola does
whatWeDo.intro: We build technology for a resilient, open internet. We want to give people back control over their own data and prefer to spend our time on open source software that benefits everyone.

items.name: AtomicServer
items.desc: A graph database and app server (Rust + Typescript / React) demonstrating how we can make the web decentralized again. Free from data silos, built on Linked Data principles.

items.name: PrepNet
items.desc: A decentralized network to maintain digital communication during emergencies (internet outages / disasters). Extremely challenging network architecture (Rust + Typescript / React) with huge social impact.

items.name: ELFA
items.desc: Our Local First Apps. We build platforms where data is primarily stored with the user, allowing us to offer unprecedented privacy, offline-first capabilities and lightning-fast UX (Rust + Typescript / React).

whatWeOffer.title: What we offer
items: Technical, small, driven and innovative team with a relaxed and warm atmosphere
Want to build technology for good
Cozy office space in Soest, can also work from home
Equipment / laptop (almost everyone works with macbooks)
Market rate salary depending on profile (€3500-€6000/month)
